jobDescription: We are looking for an experienced hands-on senior software engineer with proven abilities to deliver fast and efficiently. A true team player who is eager to be part of a very unique opportunity in the startup scene. Qualifications & Experience B. Sc. degree in Computer Science, SW Engineering or equivalent ( M. Sc. is an advantage) At least 3 years of experience in Java server side development, including cloud services (preferably AWS) Experience in building complex large-scale software solutions from scratch to live production Strong analytical skills Self-starter, fast learner, can-do attitude and great inter-personal skills Excellent English communication skills – spoken and written Financial affinity – an advantage Location550 5th Avenue, 10th Floor New York, NY 10036
